title: Exposure Enhanced Camera
description: Makes the camera from the Exposure mod look more like its model!
body:
![A banner showing the original and retextured camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a683191dd18e59dd65dfd166d6ebe2bd5c467f4.png)


This resource pack changes the camera textures in the inventory GUI from the [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod, making it look a bit longer and more like its 3D model.

(prior to 1.9.0) The texture of the camera model has also been changed, removing most of the colors that look pretty much the same, making the texture slightly cleaner.
